final:
module knn_classifier (
    input [7:0] point_x,     // x-coordinate of the input point
    input [7:0] point_y,     // y-coordinate of the input point
    input [7:0] point1_x,    // x-coordinate of the first reference point
    input [7:0] point1_y,    // y-coordinate of the first reference point
    input [7:0] point2_x,    // x-coordinate of the second reference point
    input [7:0] point2_y,    // y-coordinate of the second reference point
    output reg classification  // classification output: 0 or 1
);
    wire [15:0] dist1, dist2; // distances squared for comparison

  assign dist2 = (point_x - point2_x) * (point_x - point2_x) + (point_y - point2_y) * (point_y - point2_y);
  assign dist1 = (point_x - point1_x) * (point_x - point1_x) + (point_y - point1_y) * (point_y - point1_y);

    always @(*) begin
        if (dist1 < dist2)
            classification = 0; // classify as point1
        else
            classification = 1; // classify as point2
    end
endmodule

module D_flip_flop (
    input wire D,
    input wire CLK,
    input wire RST,
    output reg Q
);
    wire S, R;

  assign R = ~D & RST;
  assign S = D & ~RST;

    always @(posedge CLK or posedge RST) begin
        if (RST) begin
            Q <= 0;           // Reset output Q to 0
        end else begin
            Q <= S;           // Transfer D to Q
        end
    end
endmodule

module top_module(
    input A1,
    input A2,
    input B1,
    input VPWR,
    output X,
    output Y,
    output Z,
    output W
  assign W = B1 & VPWR;
  assign Z = A1 ^ A2;
  assign Y = A1 | A2;
  assign X = A1 & A2;

endmodule

module top_module(
    input A,
    input B,
    input VPWR,
    input VGND,
    input VPB,
    input VNB,
    output COUT,
    output SUM
  assign COUT = A & B;
  assign SUM = A ^ B;

endmodule

assign YC = A & B;
  assign YS = A ^ B;

assign carryout = ((A ^ B) & carryin)|(A & B);
  assign sum = (A ^ B ^ carryin);

module top_module(
  input iA,
  input iB,
  output oSUM,
  output oCARRY
  assign oCARRY = iA & iB;

  
  assign oSUM = iA ^ iB;
endmodule

module top_module(
	 input	A0,
	 input	A1,
	 input	A2,
	 input	A3,
	 input	B0,
	 input	B1,
	 input	B2,
	 input	B3,
	 output	GT,
	 output	LT
  assign LT = {A3,A2,A1,A0} < {B3,B2,B1,B0};
  assign GT = {A3,A2,A1,A0} > {B3,B2,B1,B0};
	 
	 

endmodule

module top_module(
 input [7:0] input_signal,
 output [3:0] output_signal_1,
 output [3:0] output_signal_2
  assign output_signal_2 = input_signal[3:0];
  assign output_signal_1 = input_signal[7:4];

endmodule

module top_module (
	input [15:0] p,
	input [15:0] q,
	output [15:0] out_xor,
  assign out_not = ~p;
  assign out_xor = p ^ q;

endmodule

module top_module(
    input [3:0] A,
    input [3:0] B,
    output EQ,
    output GT
  assign GT = (A > B);
  assign EQ = (A == B);

endmodule

module top_module(
  input [1:0] sel,
  input [7:0] a,
  input [7:0] b,
  input [7:0] c,
  input [7:0] d,
  output [7:0] out
);wire [7:0] mux_out;

  assign out = mux_out;
                   (sel == 2'b01) ? b :
                   (sel == 2'b10) ? c :
                                    d;

  assign mux_out = (sel == 2'b00) ? a :
                   (sel == 2'b01) ? b :
                   (sel == 2'b10) ? c :
                                    d;

endmodule

module top_module(
 input [15:0] immediate,
 input Extsel,
 output [31:0] Eximmidiate 
  assign Eximmidiate[31:16]=Extsel?(immediate[15] ? 16'hffff : 16'h0000) : 16'h0000;
  assign Eximmidiate[15:0]=immediate;
endmodule

module top_module(
input in1,
input in2,
input cin,
output sum,
output cout
  assign cout = (in1 & in2) | (cin & (in1 ^ in2));
  assign sum = (in1 ^ in2) ^ cin;

module top_module(
		
		input wire iCLOCK,
		input wire inRESET,
		input wire iRESET_SYNC,
		
		input wire iREMOVE,
		
		
		input wire iRD_REQ,
		output wire oRD_BUSY,		
		input wire [31:0] iRD_ADDR,		
		
		output wire oRD_VALID,
		output wire oRD_HIT,
		input wire iRD_BUSY,		
		output wire [63:0] oRD_DATA,
		output wire [23:0] oRD_MMU_FLAGS,
		
		input wire iWR_REQ,
		output wire oWR_BUSY,
		input wire [31:0] iWR_ADDR,	
		input wire [511:0] iWR_DATA,
		input wire [255:0] iWR_MMU_FLAGS
  assign oWR_BUSY = 1'b0;
	
	reg b_req_valid;
	always@(posedge iCLOCK or negedge inRESET)begin
		if(!inRESET)begin
			b_req_valid <= 1'b0;
		end
		else if(iRESET_SYNC)begin
			b_req_valid <= 1'b0;
		end
		else if(iREMOVE)begin
			b_req_valid <= 1'b0;
		end
		else begin
			b_req_valid <= iRD_REQ;
		end
	end

  assign oRD_MMU_FLAGS = 23'h0;
  assign oRD_DATA = 64'h0;
  assign oRD_HIT = 1'b0;
  assign oRD_VALID = b_req_valid;
  assign oRD_BUSY = 1'b0;
	
endmodule

module top_module(
    input [3:0] in0,
    input [3:0] in1,
    output EQ,
    output GT
  assign GT = (in0 > in1) ? 1'b1 : 1'b0;
  assign EQ = (in0 == in1) ? 1'b1 : 1'b0;

endmodule

assign out[31:26] = 6'b00_0000;
  assign out[25:0] = in;

module top_module(
  input A,
  input B,
  output SUM,
  output CARRY,
  input VPWR,
  input VGND,
  input VPB,
  input VNB
);// Define the behavioral implementation of a half adder
  assign CARRY = A & B;
  assign SUM = A ^ B;

endmodule

module top_module(
    input signed [18:0] i_0,
    input signed [18:0] i_1,
    input signed [18:0] i_2,
    input signed [18:0] i_3,
    output signed [18:0] o_0,
    output signed [18:0] o_1,
    output signed [18:0] o_2,
    output signed [18:0] o_3
  assign o_3 = i_3;
  assign o_2 = i_1;
  assign o_1 = i_2;
  assign o_0 = i_0;
endmodule

module top_module(
    input [7:0] X,
    input [7:0] Y,
    output [7:0] CHAR,
    output [7:0] ATTR
  assign ATTR = { X[3:0], Y[3:0] };
  assign CHAR = 64 + X + Y;

endmodule

module top_module(
    input xi,
    input yi,
    output Si,
    output Co
  assign Co = xi & yi;
  assign Si = xi ^ yi;

endmodule

module top_module(
	input a,
	input b,
	output sum,
	output carry
  assign carry = a&b;
  assign sum = a^b;

endmodule

module top_module (
	input [15:0] x,
	input [15:0] y,
	output out_greater,
  assign out_equal = (x == y) ? 1 : 0;
  assign out_greater = (x > y) ? 1 : 0;

endmodule

module top_module(
    input clk,
    input we,
    input [4:0] r_addr1,
    input [4:0] r_addr2,
    input [4:0] w_addr,
    input [31:0] w_data,
    output [31:0] r_data1,
    output [31:0] r_data2
);reg [31:0] mem [0:31];             
    always @(posedge clk) begin
        mem[0] <= 32'd0;
        if(we && (w_addr != 5'd0)) mem[w_addr] <= w_data; 
    end
  assign r_data2 = mem[r_addr2];
  assign r_data1 = mem[r_addr1];
    
endmodule

module top_module(
    input [31:0] input_signal,
    output [21:0] output_upper,
    output [9:0] output_lower
  assign output_lower = input_signal[9:0];
  assign output_upper = input_signal[31:10];

endmodule

module top_module(
    input A,
    input B,
    input C,
    input D,
    output X,
    output Y
  assign Y = C | (B & D);
  assign X = A & B;

endmodule

module top_module(
    input logic [31:0] in_signal,
    output logic [15:0] out_signal1,
    output logic [15:0] out_signal2
  assign out_signal2 = {1'b0, in_signal[31:16]};
  assign out_signal1 = in_signal[15:0];

endmodule

module top_module(
    input A1,
    input A2,
    input A3,
    input A4,
    input B1,
    input VPWR,
    input VGND,
    input VPB,
    input VNB,
    output Y
);wire and_output;
  assign Y = (B1 == 0) ? and_output : ~and_output;

  assign and_output = A1 & A2 & A3 & A4;

endmodule

module top_module(
    input [3:0] A,
    input [3:0] B,
    output equal,
    output greater
  assign greater = (A > B) ? 1'b1 : 1'b0;
  assign equal = (A == B) ? 1'b1 : 1'b0;

endmodule

assign carryO=(~x&y)|(~x&cIn)|(y&cIn);
  assign s=x^y^cIn;

module top_module(
    input a,
    input b,
    input c,
    output carry,
    output sum
  assign sum = a ^ b ^ c;
  assign carry = (a & b) | ( (a ^ b) & c);

assign YC = (A & B) | (B & C) | (A & C);
  assign YS = (A ^ B) ^ C;

assign co=(a&b)|(b&ci)|(ci&a);
  assign s=a^b^ci;

module top_module(
  input clk,
  input [0:0] probe0,
  input [7:0] probe1,
  input [0:0] probe2,
  input [7:0] probe3,
  output [0:0] out_probe0,
  output [7:0] out_probe1,
  output [0:0] out_probe2,
  output [7:0] out_probe3
  assign out_probe3 = probe3 & 8'h55;
  assign out_probe2 = probe2;
  assign out_probe1 = ~probe1;
  assign out_probe0 = probe0;

endmodule

module top_module(
    input too_cold,
    input too_hot,
    input mode,
    input fan_on,
    output heater,
    output aircon,
    output fan
  assign aircon = ~mode & too_hot;
  assign heater = mode & too_cold;
  assign fan = fan_on | heater | aircon;

endmodule

module top_module(
    input a,
    input b,
    output c,
    output s
  assign s=a^b;
  assign c=a&b;

endmodule

module top_module(
    input [15:0]  m_alu_result,
    input [15:0]  m_dm_dout,
    input [2:0]   m_reg_waddr,
    input         cu_reg_data_loc,
    input         cu_reg_load,
    output [15:0] wb_reg_wdata,
    output        wb_reg_wea,
    output [2:0]  wb_reg_waddr
  assign wb_reg_waddr = m_reg_waddr;

  assign wb_reg_wea = cu_reg_load;
  assign wb_reg_wdata = cu_reg_data_loc ? m_dm_dout : m_alu_result;

endmodule

module top_module(
    output [31:0] ResultW,
    output [4:0] WriteRegW2,
    output RegWriteW2,
    input [31:0] ReadDataW, ALUResultW,
    input [4:0] WriteRegW1,
    input MemToRegW, RegWriteW1
  assign RegWriteW2 = RegWriteW1;

    
  assign WriteRegW2 = WriteRegW1;
  assign ResultW = MemToRegW ? ReadDataW : ALUResultW;

endmodule

module top_module(
	input [16:0]a,
	output [2:0]x,
	output [15:0]y
  assign y = a[16:1];
  assign x = a[2:0];

endmodule

module top_module(
  input a,
  input b,
  input c,
  output reg y1,
  output reg y2
  assign y2 = ~(a ^ b);
  assign y1 = ~(a | b | c);
  
endmodule

module top_module(
	input a,
	input b, 
	input carry_i,
	output sum,
  assign carry_o = (a & b) | (a & carry_i) | (b & carry_i);
  assign sum = a ^ b ^ carry_i;


endmodule

module top_module(
    input a,
    output g1,
    output g2
  assign g2 = ~a;
  assign g1 = a;
endmodule

module top_module(
    input A,
    input B,
    input C,
    output X,
    output Y
  assign Y = A ? (B & C) : (B | C);
  assign X = A ? 1 : 0;

endmodule

module top_module (
	input [3:0] p,
	input [3:0] q,
	output [3:0] out_shift_left,
  assign out_shift_right = q >> 1;
  assign out_shift_left = p << 1;

endmodule

module top_module(
    input Uin,
    input Din,
    input Lin,
    input Rin,
    output Uout,
    output Dout,
    output Lout,
    output Rout
  assign Rout = ~Lin & Rin;
  assign Lout = Lin & ~Rin;
  assign Dout = ~Uin & Din;
  assign Uout = Uin & ~Din;
endmodule

assign c_out = a & b;
  assign s = a ^ b;

module top_module (
	input [3:0] x,
	input [3:0] y,
	output [3:0] out_and,
  assign out_or = x | y;
  assign out_and = x & y;

endmodule

module top_module(
	 input [1:0] ForwardRSD,
	 input [1:0] ForwardRTD,
	 input [31:0] result_W,
	 input [31:0] result_WD,
	 input [31:0] Data1,
	 input [31:0] Data2,
	 input [31:0] ALUout_M,
	 output [31:0] D1,
	 output [31:0] D2
  assign D2 = 
		(ForwardRTD === 2'b00)?Data2:
		(ForwardRTD === 2'b01)?ALUout_M:
		(ForwardRTD === 2'b10)?result_W:
		(ForwardRTD === 2'b11)?result_WD:0;
		(ForwardRSD === 2'b00)?Data1:
		(ForwardRSD === 2'b01)?ALUout_M:
		(ForwardRSD === 2'b10)?result_W:
		(ForwardRSD === 2'b11)?result_WD:0;
		
  assign D1 = 
		(ForwardRSD === 2'b00)?Data1:
		(ForwardRSD === 2'b01)?ALUout_M:
		(ForwardRSD === 2'b10)?result_W:
		(ForwardRSD === 2'b11)?result_WD:0;
		(ForwardRTD === 2'b00)?Data2:
		(ForwardRTD === 2'b01)?ALUout_M:
		(ForwardRTD === 2'b10)?result_W:
		(ForwardRTD === 2'b11)?result_WD:0;


endmodule

module top_module(
    input wire [15:0] in,
    input wire [3:0] shift_amt,
    output wire [7:0] out_hi,
    output wire [7:0] out_lo
);// 16-bit barrel shifter
    reg [15:0] shifted_in;
    always @(*) begin
        shifted_in = (shift_amt == 0) ? in :
                     (shift_amt == 1) ? {in[14:0], 1'b0} :
                     (shift_amt == 2) ? {in[13:0], 2'b00} :
                     (shift_amt == 3) ? {in[12:0], 3'b000} :
                     (shift_amt == 4) ? {in[11:0], 4'b0000} :
                     (shift_amt == 5) ? {in[10:0], 5'b00000} :
                     (shift_amt == 6) ? {in[9:0], 6'b000000} :
                     (shift_amt == 7) ? {in[8:0], 7'b0000000} :
                     (shift_amt == 8) ? {in[7:0], 8'b00000000} :
                     (shift_amt == 9) ? {in[6:0], 9'b000000000} :
                     (shift_amt == 10) ? {in[5:0], 10'b0000000000} :
                     (shift_amt == 11) ? {in[4:0], 11'b00000000000} :
                     (shift_amt == 12) ? {in[3:0], 12'b000000000000} :
                     (shift_amt == 13) ? {in[2:0], 13'b0000000000000} :
                     (shift_amt == 14) ? {in[1:0], 14'b00000000000000} :
                     {in[0], 15'b000000000000000};
    end

    // Separate 16-bit input into two 8-bit outputs
  assign out_lo = shifted_in[7:0];
  assign out_hi = shifted_in[15:8];

endmodule

module top_module(
  input [2:0] A,
  input [2:0] B,
  input [2:0] C,
  output reg [2:0] Y1,
  output reg [2:0] Y2,
  output reg [2:0] Y3
  assign Y3 = B ^ C;
  assign Y2 = A | C;
  assign Y1 = A & B;

endmodule

module top_module(
    input clk, reset, regWrite,
    input [3:0] writeReg, readReg1, readReg2,
    input [31:0] writeData,
    output [31:0] readData1, readData2
);reg [31:0] registers [0:15];

integer i;  // Variable for initialization

always @(posedge clk) begin
    if (reset) begin
        for (i = 0; i < 16; i = i + 1) begin
            registers[i] <= 32'd0; // Initialize each register to 0
        end
    end else if (regWrite) begin
        registers[writeReg] <= writeData;
    end
end

  assign readData2 = registers[readReg2];
  assign readData1 = registers[readReg1];

endmodule

module top_module(
    input clk,
    input rst,
    input load,
    input [0:0] D,
    output [0:0] Q
);wire [0:0] Q_next;
    reg [0:0] Q_reg; // Change from wire to reg

  assign Q_next[0] = (load == 1'b1) ? D : (Q_reg[0] + D[0]);

  assign Q = Q_reg;

    always @(posedge clk or posedge rst) begin
        if (rst) begin
            Q_reg <= 1'b0; // Reset condition
        end else begin
            Q_reg <= Q_next; // Update Q_reg with Q_next
        end
    end
    
endmodule

module top_module(
     input  [7:0] in0,
     input  [7:0] in1,
     output wire [7:0] out0,
     output wire [7:0] out1
  assign out1 = (in0<in1) ? in1:in0;
  assign out0 = (in0<in1) ? in0:in1;

module top_module(
  input a,
  input b,
  input ci,
  output reg sum,
  output reg co
  assign co = (a & b) | (a & ci) | (b & ci);
  assign sum = a ^ b ^ ci;

endmodule

assign Y = A == A, Z = A != A;
endmodule

module top_module(
    input [31:0] ex_rdata_a,
    input [31:0] ex_rdata_b,
    input [31:0] mem_wb_dout,
    input control_rdata_a,
    input control_rdata_b,
    output wire [31:0] rdata_a,
    output wire [31:0] rdata_b
  assign rdata_b = (control_rdata_b == 1'b1)?mem_wb_dout:ex_rdata_b;
  assign rdata_a = (control_rdata_a == 1'b1)?mem_wb_dout:ex_rdata_a;

endmodule

module top_module(
   output S,
	output Co,
	input X,
	input Y,
	input C   
  assign Co = ((X&Y)| (X^Y)&C);
  assign S = X^Y^C;

endmodule

module top_module(
    input signed [31:0] input_value,
    output signed [15:0] output_value,
    output signed sign_flag
  assign sign_flag = (input_value < 0) ? 1'b1 : 1'b0;
  assign output_value = input_value >> 16;

endmodule

assign b=in1%in2;
  assign a=in1/in2;

module top_module(
  input clk,
  input write_en1,
  input write_en2,
  input [ADDR_WIDTH-1:0] addr1,
  input [ADDR_WIDTH-1:0] addr2,
  input [width-1:0] data_in1,
  input [width-1:0] data_in2,
  output [width-1:0] data_out1,
  output [width-1:0] data_out2
);parameter depth = 256; // number of words in memory
parameter width = 8; // number of bits per word
parameter ADDR_WIDTH = $clog2(depth); // Calculate address width

reg [width-1:0] mem [0:depth-1];

always @(posedge clk) begin
  if (write_en1) begin
    mem[addr1] <= data_in1;
  end
  if (write_en2) begin
    mem[addr2] <= data_in2;
  end
end

  assign data_out2 = mem[addr2];
  assign data_out1 = mem[addr1];

endmodule

module top_module(input clk,

        input rst,

        input RegWr,

        input [0:4] Rw,

        input [0:31] Data_in,

        input [0:4] Rs,

        output [0:31] BusA,

        input [0:4] Rt,

     output [0:31] BusB);reg [0:31] 	   regfile [0:31];




  assign BusB = regfile[Rt];


  assign BusA = regfile[Rs];




   integer 	   i;


   always @(posedge clk or negedge rst) begin

      if (~rst) begin

	 for (i = 0; i < 32; i = i + 1) begin

	    regfile[i] <= 0;


	 end

      end else begin

	 if (RegWr) regfile[Rw] <= Data_in;
		

	       end 

   end 

   endmodule

module top_module(
    input [2:0] sel_mux, // Select input for the multiplexers
    input [3:0] data0, // Input data for the first multiplexer
    input [3:0] data1,
    input [3:0] data2,
    input [3:0] data3,
    input [3:0] data4,
    input [3:0] data5,
    input [3:0] data0_mux2, // Input data for the second multiplexer
    input [3:0] data1_mux2,
    input [3:0] data2_mux2,
    input [3:0] data3_mux2,
    input [3:0] data4_mux2,
    input [3:0] data5_mux2,
    output [3:0] out // Output of the adder
);// Multiplexer 1
wire [3:0] mux_out1;
  assign out = add_out;
                  (sel_mux == 3'b001) ? data1 :
                  (sel_mux == 3'b010) ? data2 :
                  (sel_mux == 3'b011) ? data3 :
                  (sel_mux == 3'b100) ? data4 :
                  (sel_mux == 3'b101) ? data5 :
                  4'bzzzz;

// Multiplexer 2
wire [3:0] mux_out2;
  assign add_out = mux_out1 + mux_out2;
                  (sel_mux == 3'b001) ? data1_mux2 :
                  (sel_mux == 3'b010) ? data2_mux2 :
                  (sel_mux == 3'b011) ? data3_mux2 :
                  (sel_mux == 3'b100) ? data4_mux2 :
                  (sel_mux == 3'b101) ? data5_mux2 :
                  4'bzzzz;

// Adder
wire [3:0] add_out;
  assign mux_out2 = (sel_mux == 3'b000) ? data0_mux2 :
                  (sel_mux == 3'b001) ? data1_mux2 :
                  (sel_mux == 3'b010) ? data2_mux2 :
                  (sel_mux == 3'b011) ? data3_mux2 :
                  (sel_mux == 3'b100) ? data4_mux2 :
                  (sel_mux == 3'b101) ? data5_mux2 :
                  4'bzzzz;

// Output
  assign mux_out1 = (sel_mux == 3'b000) ? data0 :
                  (sel_mux == 3'b001) ? data1 :
                  (sel_mux == 3'b010) ? data2 :
                  (sel_mux == 3'b011) ? data3 :
                  (sel_mux == 3'b100) ? data4 :
                  (sel_mux == 3'b101) ? data5 :
                  4'bzzzz;

endmodule

module top_module(
	input 					enable_1,
	input 					wea_1,
	input 			[15:0]	data_in_1,
	input 			[15:0]	address_1,
	input 					enable_2,
	input 					wea_2,
	input 			[15:0]	data_in_2,
	input 			[15:0]	address_2,

	output 	wire			enable,
	output 	wire 			wea,
	output 	wire 	[15:0]	data_in,
	output 	wire 	[15:0]	address
  assign address 	= (enable_1 == 1'b1)?address_1:(enable_2 == 1'b1)?address_2:16'h0000;
  assign data_in 	= (enable_1 == 1'b1)?data_in_1:(enable_2 == 1'b1)?data_in_2:16'h0000;
  assign wea 		= (enable_1 == 1'b1)?wea_1:(enable_2 == 1'b1)?wea_2:1'b0;
  assign enable 	= (enable_1 == 1'b1)?enable_1:(enable_2 == 1'b1)?enable_2:1'b0;

endmodule

module top_module(
    input wire [2:0] vec,
    output wire [2:0] outv,
    output wire o2,
    output wire o1,
    output wire o0
  assign outv = vec;
  assign {o2, o1, o0} = vec;

endmodule

assign c=a&b;
  assign s=a^b;

module top_module(
	input a,
	input b,
	input c,
	output s,
	output co
  assign co = (a & b) | (a & c) | (b & c);
  assign s = a ^ b ^ c;


endmodule

module top_module(
    input  D   ,
    output reg Q   ,  // Changed to reg for sequential logic
    output Q_N ,
    input  SCD ,
    input  SCE ,
    input  CLK ,
    input  VPB ,
    input  VPWR,
    input  VGND,
    input  VNB
);wire D_ff;

  assign Q_N = ~Q;

always @(posedge CLK) begin
    Q <= D_ff;  // 'Q' must be assigned as it is now a reg type
end

  assign D_ff = SCE ? SCD : D;

endmodule

module top_module( 
    input p1a, p1b, p1c, p1d, p1e, p1f,
    output p1y,
    input p2a, p2b, p2c, p2d,
  assign p2y = (p2a & p2b) | (p2d & p2c);
  assign p1y = (p1a & p1b & p1c) | (p1d & p1e & p1f);
endmodule

module top_module(
    input A,
    input B,
    output sum,
    output carry_out
  assign carry_out = A & B;
  assign sum = A ^ B;

endmodule

module top_module(
  input [1:0] address,
  input chipselect,
  input clk,
  input reset_n,
  input write_n,
  input [31:0] writedata,
  output reg [7:0] out_port,
  output reg [31:0] readdata
);reg [7:0] data_out;
  reg [31:0] mem [0:3]; // Declare memory array

  always @(posedge clk or negedge reset_n) begin
    if (~reset_n) begin
      data_out <= 0;
      mem[0] <= 0; // Initialize memory contents individually
      mem[1] <= 0;
      mem[2] <= 0;
      mem[3] <= 0;
    end
    else begin
      if (chipselect) begin
        if (~write_n) begin
          mem[address] <= writedata; // Write data to memory
        end
        else begin
          data_out <= mem[address][7:0]; // Read lower 8 bits from memory
        end
      end
      else begin
        data_out <= 0;
      end
    end
  end

  assign readdata = mem[address];
  assign out_port = data_out;

endmodule

module top_module (
	input [7:0] a,
	input [7:0] b,
	output [7:0] out_and,
  assign out_or = a | b;
  assign out_and = a & b;

endmodule

module top_module(
    input wire 		 clk_i,
    
    input wire [4 : 0] 	 w_add_i,
    input wire [31 : 0]  w_dat_i,
    input wire 		 write_en_i,
    
    input wire [4 : 0] 	 a_add_sel,
    input wire [4 : 0] 	 b_add_sel,

    output wire [31 : 0] r_port_a_o,
    output wire [31 : 0] r_port_b_o
);reg [31 : 0] mem [31 : 0];  

    
    always @(posedge clk_i) begin
        if (write_en_i) begin
            if (w_add_i != 5'b11111) begin
                mem[w_add_i] = w_dat_i;
            end
        end
    end

  assign r_port_b_o = (b_add_sel != 5'b11111) ? mem[b_add_sel] : 32'h00000000;
  assign r_port_a_o = (a_add_sel != 5'b11111) ? mem[a_add_sel] : 32'h00000000;
   
endmodule

module top_module(
input	A,
input	B,
output	S,
output	carry
  assign	carry=A&B;
  assign	S=A^B;

module top_module(
    input [31:0] IR_D,
    input [1:0] A3_SEL,
    output [4:0] A3,
    input [31:0] RF_RT,
    input [31:0] imm_ext,
    input ALUB_SEL,
    output [31:0] ALUB,
    input [31:0] RDATA,
    input [31:0] RES_ALU_W,
    input [31:0] PC8_W,
    input [1:0] WD3_SEL,
    output [31:0] WD3,
    input [31:0] RES_ALU_E,
    input [31:0] HL_E,
    input AO_SEL_E,
    output [31:0] AO_E
    );wire[4:0] rt, rd;
  assign AO_E = AO_SEL_E? HL_E : RES_ALU_E;
    
  assign WD3 = (WD3_SEL == 2'b00)? RES_ALU_W:
                 (WD3_SEL == 2'b01)? RDATA:
                 (WD3_SEL == 2'b10)? PC8_W:
                                     RES_ALU_W;
                (A3_SEL == 2'b01)? rd:
                (A3_SEL == 2'b10)? 5'h1f:
                                   rt;

  assign ALUB = (ALUB_SEL == 1'b1)? imm_ext : RF_RT;

  assign A3 = (A3_SEL == 2'b00)? rt:
                (A3_SEL == 2'b01)? rd:
                (A3_SEL == 2'b10)? 5'h1f:
                                   rt;
                 (WD3_SEL == 2'b01)? RDATA:
                 (WD3_SEL == 2'b10)? PC8_W:
                                     RES_ALU_W;   

  assign {rt, rd} = IR_D[20:11];

endmodule

module top_module(
output wire r,
output wire cout,
input wire a,
input wire b,
input wire cin
  assign cout = (a & b) | ( a & cin ) | ( b & cin ) ;
  assign r = (a ^ b) ^ (cin) ;

  input  [15:0] io_ins_0_size,
  output [63:0] io_out_addr,

  output [15:0] io_out_size
  assign io_out_size = io_ins_0_size;
  assign io_out_isWr = io_ins_0_isWr;
  assign io_out_addr = io_ins_0_addr;
endmodule

module top_module(
    input [7:0] R_in,
    input [7:0] G_in,
    input [7:0] B_in,
    output [7:0] R_out,
    output [7:0] G_out,
    output [7:0] B_out
  assign B_out = B_in - R_in;
  assign G_out = G_in + B_in;
  assign R_out = R_in - G_in;

endmodule

    output [4:0]rw,

    output we

always @(*) begin
     if(MEM2REG_M==1) din<=memdata;
        else din<=aludata; 
end

endmodule

module top_module(

    input  B1  ,
    output Y   ,
    input  VPB ,
    input  VPWR,
    input  VGND,
    input  VNB
);wire and_result;

  assign Y = B1 ? 1 : and_result;

  assign and_result = A1 & A2 & A3 & A4;

endmodule

module top_module(
  input [3:0] in1,
  input [3:0] in2,
  input [3:0] in3,
  input [3:0] in4,
  output eq,
  output gt
);wire [3:0] max_value = 4'b0111; // Binary value of 7

  assign gt = (in1 > max_value) || (in2 > max_value) || (in3 > max_value) || (in4 > max_value);
  
  assign eq = (in1 == in2) && (in2 == in3) && (in3 == in4);

endmodule

assign x = a, y = a;
endmodule

module top_module(
input wire		regwrite_WB,
input wire [4:0] wa_WB,
input wire [4:0]ra1_EX,
input wire [4:0]ra2_EX,
	
output wire forwardA,forwardB

  assign forwardB = ((wa_WB == ra2_EX)&(regwrite_WB)&(wa_WB != 5'b0));
  assign forwardA = ((wa_WB == ra1_EX)&(regwrite_WB)&(wa_WB != 5'b0));

assign g=x&y;
  assign p=x|y;

module top_module(
    input in_VPWR,
    input in_VGND,
    input in_VPB,
    input in_VNB,
    output out_VPWR,
    output out_VGND,
    output out_VPB,
    output out_VNB

  assign out_VGND = in_VGND;
  assign out_VPWR = in_VPWR;

endmodule

module top_module(
    input [2:0] sel, // input for multiplexer select
    input [3:0] data0, // data inputs for multiplexer
    input [3:0] data1,
    input [3:0] data2,
    input [3:0] data3,
    input [3:0] data4,
    input [3:0] data5,
    input [3:0] in, // input for priority encoder
    output [7:0] q  // 8-bit output from the functional module
);// 6-to-1 multiplexer
    wire [3:0] mux_out;
  assign q = {enc_out, 4'b0000} + mux_out;
                     (sel == 1) ? data1 :
                     (sel == 2) ? data2 :
                     (sel == 3) ? data3 :
                     (sel == 4) ? data4 :
                     (sel == 5) ? data5 : 4'b0000;

    // 4-bit priority encoder
    wire [1:0] enc_out;
  assign enc_out = (in[3]) ? 2'b11 :
                     (in[2]) ? 2'b10 :
                     (in[1]) ? 2'b01 :
                     (in[0]) ? 2'b00 : 2'b00;
                     (in[2]) ? 2'b10 :
                     (in[1]) ? 2'b01 :
                     (in[0]) ? 2'b00 : 2'b00;

    // Functional module
  assign mux_out = (sel == 0) ? data0 :
                     (sel == 1) ? data1 :
                     (sel == 2) ? data2 :
                     (sel == 3) ? data3 :
                     (sel == 4) ? data4 :
                     (sel == 5) ? data5 : 4'b0000;

endmodule

module top_module(

    input  wire rx,
    output wire tx,

	input  wire [15:0] sw,
	output wire [15:0] led
  assign tx = rx;

  
  assign led = sw;
endmodule

module top_module(
    input  A   ,
    input  B   ,
    input  CIN ,
    input  VPB ,
    input  VPWR,
    input  VGND,
    input  VNB ,
    output COUT,
    output SUM 
  assign COUT = (A & B) | (CIN & (A ^ B));
  assign SUM = (A ^ B) ^ CIN;

endmodule

module top_module( 
    input clk,
    input reset,            // Synchronous reset
    input [2:0] sel, 
    input [3:0] data0,
    input [3:0] data1,
    input [3:0] data2,
    input [3:0] data3,
    input [3:0] data4,
    input [3:0] data5,
    output [7:0] final_output
);// 6-to-1 Multiplexer
    wire [3:0] mux_output;
  assign final_output = shift_reg + mux_output;
                        (sel == 1) ? data1 :
                        (sel == 2) ? data2 :
                        (sel == 3) ? data3 :
                        (sel == 4) ? data4 :
                        (sel == 5) ? data5 : 4'b0;
    
    // 8-bit Shift Register
    reg [7:0] shift_reg;
    always @(negedge clk) begin
        if (reset) begin
            shift_reg <= 8'b0;
        end else begin
            shift_reg <= {shift_reg[6:0], mux_output};
        end
    end
    
    // Final Output
  assign mux_output = (sel == 0) ? data0 :
                        (sel == 1) ? data1 :
                        (sel == 2) ? data2 :
                        (sel == 3) ? data3 :
                        (sel == 4) ? data4 :
                        (sel == 5) ? data5 : 4'b0;
    
endmodule

module top_module(
    output reg [7:0] Y,
    output reg Sbar,
    output reg AeqB,
    output reg AneqB,
    input [7:0] A,
    input [7:0] B,
    input S,
    input VPWR,  // Changed to input
    input VGND,  // Changed to input
    input VPB,   // Changed to input
    input VNB    // Changed to input
);always @(*) begin
        if (S == 0) begin
            Y = A;
        end else begin
            Y = B;
        end
    end

  assign AneqB = (A != B) ? 1 : 0;
  assign AeqB = (A == B) ? 1 : 0;
  assign Sbar = ~S;

endmodule

module top_module(
  input A1,
  input A2,
  input B1,
  input B2,
  output X,
  input VPB,
  input VPWR,
  input VGND,
  input VNB
);wire sel;
  assign X = sel ? (A1 ? B1 : B2) : 1'b0;

  assign sel = A1 | A2;

endmodule

module top_module(
    input i_a,

    input i_cin,
    output o_result,
  assign o_cout = (i_a & i_b) | (i_a & i_cin) | (i_b & i_cin);
  assign o_result = i_a ^ i_b ^ i_cin;
endmodule

module top_module(
    input [7:0] a,
    input [7:0] b,

endmodule

  assign out_add = m + n;

endmodule

	input [2:0] x,
	output o,
	output care
  assign care = x[0] == x[2];
  assign o = x[0] ^ x[1] ^ x[2];
endmodule

module top_module (
	input [31:0] a,
	input [31:0] b,
	output [31:0] out_max,
  assign out_min = (a < b) ? a : b;
  assign out_max = (a > b) ? a : b;

endmodule

module top_module(
	input [7:0] x,
	input [6:0] y,
	input [19:0] delay_q,
	input clk,
	input resetn,
	output reg [2:0] colourout,
	output [7:0] xout,
	output [6:0] yout);reg [3:0] count;
	
	always @(posedge clk) begin
		if (!resetn) begin
			count <= 4'd0;
		end
		else
			count <= count + 1;
	end
			
	always @(posedge clk) begin
		if (!resetn) begin
			colourout <= 3'd0;
		end
		else begin
			if (delay_q < 20'd830000) begin
				colourout <= 3'd0;
			end
			else begin
				colourout <= 3'd1;
			end
		end
	end

  assign yout = y + count[3:2];
  assign xout = x + count[1:0];

module top_module(
    input [3:0] A,
    input [3:0] B,
    output greater,
    output less
  assign less = (A < B);
  assign greater = (A > B);

endmodule

module top_module(
    input Mem_write_enable,
    input [31:0] MDR_data,
    output [31:0] BusData_out,
    output [31:0] Mdata_out
  assign BusData_out = Mem_write_enable ? 0 : MDR_data;
  assign Mdata_out = Mem_write_enable ? MDR_data : 0;

endmodule

module top_module(
           input I_clk,

           input I_reg_we,
           input [4:0] I_rs_addr,
           input [4:0] I_rt_addr,
           input [4:0] I_wb_addr,
           input [31:0] I_wb_data,

           output [31:0] O_rs_data,
           output [31:0] O_rt_data
       );reg [31:0] R_gpr[31:0];

always @(posedge I_clk) begin
    if(I_reg_we) begin
        R_gpr[I_wb_addr]<=I_wb_data;
    end
end

  assign O_rt_data=(I_rt_addr==0)?32'h0:R_gpr[I_rt_addr];
  assign O_rs_data=(I_rs_addr==0)?32'h0:R_gpr[I_rs_addr];

endmodule

module top_module(
	input A, 
	input B, 
	output P, 
	output G
  assign G = A&B;
  assign P = A|B;

module top_module(
  input               io_bus_cmd_valid,
  output              io_bus_cmd_ready,
  input      [2:0]    io_bus_cmd_payload_function_id,
  input      [31:0]   io_bus_cmd_payload_inputs_0,
  input      [31:0]   io_bus_cmd_payload_inputs_1,
  output              io_bus_rsp_valid,
  input               io_bus_rsp_ready,
  output              io_bus_rsp_payload_response_ok,
  output     [31:0]   io_bus_rsp_payload_outputs_0,
  input               clk
  assign io_bus_rsp_payload_outputs_0 = io_bus_cmd_payload_function_id[0] ? 
                                           io_bus_cmd_payload_inputs_1 :
                                           io_bus_cmd_payload_inputs_0 ;
  assign io_bus_rsp_payload_response_ok = 1'b1;
  assign io_bus_cmd_ready = io_bus_rsp_ready;

  
  
  
  assign io_bus_rsp_valid = io_bus_cmd_valid;
                                           io_bus_cmd_payload_inputs_1 :
                                           io_bus_cmd_payload_inputs_0 ;


endmodule

module top_module(
 input [1:0] i,
 output o1,
 output o0
  assign o0 = i[0];
  assign o1 = i[1];
endmodule

module top_module(
 input [7:0] i,
 output [4:0] o1,
 output [2:0] o0
  assign o0 = i[2:0];
  assign o1 = i[7:3];
endmodule

module alu_32bit(
    input clk,          // Chip clock signal.
    input rst_n,        // Active-low reset signal. Defined as 0 for chip reset; defined as 1 for reset signal inactive.
    input [2:0] op_sel, // Operation selection signal.
    input [31:0] a,     // First 32-bit input operand.
    input [31:0] b,     // Second 32-bit input operand.

    output [31:0] result, // 32-bit result of the ALU operation.
    output zero          // Flag signal indicating whether the result is zero.
);

reg [31:0] result_r; // Result register.
reg zero_r;          // Zero flag register.

//------------------------------------------------
// ALU operation
always @(posedge clk or negedge rst_n) begin
    if (!rst_n) begin
        result_r <= 32'b0;
    end
    else begin
        case (op_sel)
            3'b000: result_r <= a + b;   // Addition
            3'b001: result_r <= a - b;   // Subtraction
            3'b010: result_r <= a & b;   // AND
            3'b011: result_r <= a | b;   // OR
            3'b100: result_r <= a ^ b;   // XOR
            default: result_r <= 32'b0;  // Default case
        endcase
    end
end

  assign zero = zero_r;

//------------------------------------------------
// Zero flag generation
always @(posedge clk or negedge rst_n) begin
    if (!rst_n) begin
        zero_r <= 1'b0;
    end
    else begin
        zero_r <= (result_r == 32'b0);
    end
end

  assign result = result_r;

endmodule

module top_module(input   wire a,
                  input   wire b,
		  input   wire ci,
		  output  wire s,
  assign co = (a & b) | (a & ci) | (b & ci);
  assign s  = a ^ b ^ ci;
endmodule

module top_module(
    input wire       clk,   
    input wire[4:0]  rs1_i, 
    input wire[4:0]  rs2_i, 
    input wire[4:0]  rd_i,  
    input wire       w_en,  
    input wire[31:0] w_data, 
    
    output wire[31:0] rs1_o, 
    output wire[31:0] rs2_o  
    );reg[31:0] gpr[31:0]; 
    
  assign rs2_o = (rs2_i == 0) ? 32'h00000000 : gpr[rs2_i];
  assign rs1_o = (rs1_i == 0) ? 32'h00000000 : gpr[rs1_i];
    
    always @ (posedge clk) begin
        if (w_en) begin
            gpr[rd_i] <= w_data; 
        end
    end
endmodule

assign g=g2 | (p2&g1);
  assign p=p1&p2;

module top_module(
    output sumout,
    output cout,
    input a,
    input b,
    input cin
  assign cout = (a & b) | ((a | b) & cin);
  assign sumout = a ^ b ^ cin;

endmodule

module top_module(
    input in1,
    input in2,
    input in3,
    input in4,
    input in5,
    input in6,
    input in7,
    input in8,
    output out1,
    output out2,
    output out3,
    output out4
  assign out4 = ~in1;
  assign out3 = in7 ^ in8;
  assign out2 = in4 | in5 | in6;
  assign out1 = in1 & in2 & in3;

endmodule

module top_module(
    input  A   ,
    input  B   ,
    input  CIN ,
    output COUT,
    output SUM
  assign COUT = (A & B) | (A & CIN) | (B & CIN);
  assign SUM = A ^ B ^ CIN;

endmodule

module top_module(
	input ring, 
	input vibrate_mode,
	output ringer,
	output motor
  assign motor = ring & vibrate_mode;
	
	
  assign ringer = ring & ~vibrate_mode;
	
endmodule

module top_module(
    input A,
    input B,
    input CIN,
    input VPWR,
    input VGND,
    input VPB,
    input VNB,
    output COUT,
    output SUM
);// Implementing full adder using behavioral modeling
  assign COUT = (A & B) | (B & CIN) | (A & CIN);
  assign SUM = A ^ B ^ CIN;
    
endmodule

module top_module(
    input [15:0] A,
    input [3:0] B,
    output [15:0] shift_left,
    output [15:0] shift_right
  assign shift_right = A >> B;
  assign shift_left = A << B;

endmodule

module top_module(
    input [3:0] in,
    output [3:0] out,
    output lost
  assign lost= in[3];
  assign out= {{in[2:0]}, 1'b0};
endmodule

module top_module(
  input clk,
  input wen,
  input [5:0] waddr,
  input [5:0] raddr1,
  input [5:0] raddr2,
  input [31:0] wdata,
  output [31:0] rdata1,
  output [31:0] rdata2
);reg [31:0] regs [0:30]; // 31 registers, each with 32 bits

  always @(posedge clk) begin
    if (wen) regs[waddr] <= wdata; // write operation
  end

  assign rdata2 = regs[raddr2];
  assign rdata1 = regs[raddr1];

endmodule

module top_module(
   input [3:0] in1,
   input [3:0] in2,
   output [3:0] out1,
   output [3:0] out2
  assign out2 = in2 - in1;
  assign out1 = in1 - in2;

endmodule

module top_module(
  input logic [1:0] arrbkw,
  output logic y0,
  output logic y1
  assign y1 = arrbkw[0];
  assign y0 = arrbkw[1];

endmodule

module top_module(input wire [19:0] IN,
			  output wire OUT,
			  output wire LED
			  );wire result;
  assign OUT = result;
							IN[1] & 
							IN[2] & 
							IN[3] & 
							IN[4] & 
							IN[5] & 
							IN[6] & 
							IN[7] & 
							IN[8] & 
							IN[9] & 
							IN[10] & 
							IN[11] & 
							IN[12] & 
							IN[13] & 
							IN[14] & 
							IN[15] & 
							IN[16] & 
							IN[17] & 
							IN[18] & 
							IN[19];
							
  assign LED= result;
  assign result = 	IN[0] & 
							IN[1] & 
							IN[2] & 
							IN[3] & 
							IN[4] & 
							IN[5] & 
							IN[6] & 
							IN[7] & 
							IN[8] & 
							IN[9] & 
							IN[10] & 
							IN[11] & 
							IN[12] & 
							IN[13] & 
							IN[14] & 
							IN[15] & 
							IN[16] & 
							IN[17] & 
							IN[18] & 
							IN[19];


endmodule

module top_module(
		output sum,
		output carry,
		input bit_A,
		input bit_B
  assign carry = bit_A & bit_B;
  assign sum = bit_A ^ bit_B;
	
endmodule

module top_module(
 input [7:0] i,
 output o1,
 output [6:0] o0
  assign o0 = i[6:0];
  assign o1 = i[7];
endmodule

module top_module(
    input input1,
    input input2,
    input input3,
    input input4,
    input input5,
    input input6,
    input input7,
    input input8,
    output output1
);wire sum;
  assign output1 = (sum % 2 == 1) ? 1'b1 : 1'b0;
    
  assign sum = input1 + input2 + input3 + input4 + input5 + input6 + input7 + input8;

endmodule

module top_module(
  input [1:0] x_real,
  input [1:0] x_imag,
  input [1:0] y_real,
  input [1:0] y_imag,
  output [1:0] z_real,
  output [1:0] z_imag
  assign z_imag = x_imag + y_imag;
  assign z_real = x_real + y_real;

endmodule

module top_module(
    input A,
    input B,
    input Cin,
    output Sum,
    output Cout
  assign Cout = (Cin & (A ^ B)) | (A & B);
  assign Sum = Cin ^ A ^ B;
endmodule

module top_module(
  input [n-1:0] a,
  input [n-1:0] b,
  output eq,
  output gt,
  output lt
);parameter n = 8; // number of bits in input numbers

reg [2:0] result;

always @(*) begin
  if (a == b) begin
    result = 3'b001; // a equals b
  end else if (a > b) begin
    result = 3'b010; // a is greater than b
  end else begin
    result = 3'b100; // a is less than b
  end
end

  assign lt = (result == 3'b100);
  assign gt = (result == 3'b010);
  assign eq = (result == 3'b001);

endmodule

module top_module(
 input [15:0] x,
 input [15:0] y,

 output [15:0] A,
 output [15:0] B
  assign B =  x - y;
  assign A =  x + y;

endmodule

module top_module(
	input Ploc, 
	input Pant, 
	input Gloc, 
	input Gant,
	output Psal, 
	output Gsal
  assign Gsal = Gloc|(Ploc&Gant);
  assign Psal = Ploc&Pant;

module top_module(

input wire 	FPGA_CLK,
output 		WIZ_CLK,
input wire 	FPGA_MOSI,
output 		WIZ_MOSI,
output		MK_MISO,
output 		FPGA_MISO,
input wire 	WIZ_MISO,
input wire SWITCH,
input wire 	MK_CLK,
input wire 	MK_MOSI
  assign FPGA_MISO=(SWITCH==0) ? WIZ_MISO : 1'b0;
  assign MK_MISO=(SWITCH==1) ? WIZ_MISO : 1'b0;
  assign WIZ_MOSI=(SWITCH==1) ? MK_MOSI : FPGA_MOSI;
  assign WIZ_CLK=(SWITCH==1) ? MK_CLK : FPGA_CLK;



endmodule

module top_module(
    input a,
    input b,
    input c,
    output x,
    output y,
    output z
  assign z = (a == 1'b0 && b == 1'b0 && c == 1'b1);
  assign y = (a == 1'b0 && b == 1'b1);
  assign x = a;

endmodule

module top_module(
    input A,
    input B,
    input VPWR,
    input VGND,
    output SUM,
    output COUT
);// Instantiate a half-adder module or provide logic for half-adder functionality
  assign COUT = A & B;
  assign SUM = A ^ B;

endmodule

module top_module(
	input		Select,
	
	input [9:0]		ReadAddressIn0,
	input [9:0]		ReadAddressIn1,
	output[9:0]		ReadAddressOut,
	
	input [9:0]		WriteAddressIn0,
	input [9:0]		WriteAddressIn1,
	output[9:0]		WriteAddressOut,
	
	input [35:0]	DataToMemoryIn0,
	input [35:0]	DataToMemoryIn1,
	output[35:0]	DataToMemoryOut,
	
	input [35:0]	DataFromMemoryIn0,
	input [35:0]	DataFromMemoryIn1,
	output[35:0]	DataFromMemoryOut,
	
	input			ReadEnable0,
	input			ReadEnable1,
	output			ReadEnable,
	
	input			WriteEnable0,
	input			WriteEnable1,
	output			WriteEnable
  assign WriteEnable = (Select) ? WriteEnable1 : WriteEnable0;
  assign ReadEnable = (Select) ? ReadEnable1 : ReadEnable0;
  assign DataFromMemoryOut = (Select) ? DataFromMemoryIn1 : DataFromMemoryIn0;
  assign DataToMemoryOut = (Select) ? DataToMemoryIn1 : DataToMemoryIn0;
  assign WriteAddressOut = (Select) ? WriteAddressIn1 : WriteAddressIn0;
  assign ReadAddressOut = (Select) ? ReadAddressIn1 : ReadAddressIn0;

endmodule

module top_module(
 input [31:0] i,
 output [16:0] o1,
 output [14:0] o0
  assign o0 = i[14:0];
  assign o1 = i[31:15];
endmodule

module color_to_memory(color_depth_i, color_i, x_lsb_i,
                       mem_o, sel_o);
input  [1:0]  color_depth_i;
input  [31:0] color_i;
input  [1:0]  x_lsb_i;
output [31:0] mem_o;
output [3:0]  sel_o;
  assign mem_o = (color_depth_i == 2'b00) && (x_lsb_i == 2'b00) ? {color_i[7:0], 24'h000000} : 
               (color_depth_i == 2'b00) && (x_lsb_i == 2'b01) ? {color_i[7:0], 16'h0000}   : 
               (color_depth_i == 2'b00) && (x_lsb_i == 2'b10) ? {color_i[7:0], 8'h00}      : 
               (color_depth_i == 2'b00) && (x_lsb_i == 2'b11) ? {color_i[7:0]}             : 
               (color_depth_i == 2'b01) && (x_lsb_i[0] == 1'b0)  ? {color_i[15:0], 16'h0000}   : 
               (color_depth_i == 2'b01) && (x_lsb_i[0] == 1'b1)  ? {color_i[15:0]}             : 
               color_i;
               (color_depth_i == 2'b00) && (x_lsb_i == 2'b01) ? 4'b0100 : 
               (color_depth_i == 2'b00) && (x_lsb_i == 2'b10) ? 4'b0010 : 
               (color_depth_i == 2'b00) && (x_lsb_i == 2'b11) ? 4'b0001 : 
               (color_depth_i == 2'b01) && (x_lsb_i[0] == 1'b0)  ? 4'b1100  : 
               (color_depth_i == 2'b01) && (x_lsb_i[0] == 1'b1)  ? 4'b0011  : 
               4'b1111; 
  assign sel_o = (color_depth_i == 2'b00) && (x_lsb_i == 2'b00) ? 4'b1000 : 
               (color_depth_i == 2'b00) && (x_lsb_i == 2'b01) ? 4'b0100 : 
               (color_depth_i == 2'b00) && (x_lsb_i == 2'b10) ? 4'b0010 : 
               (color_depth_i == 2'b00) && (x_lsb_i == 2'b11) ? 4'b0001 : 
               (color_depth_i == 2'b01) && (x_lsb_i[0] == 1'b0)  ? 4'b1100  : 
               (color_depth_i == 2'b01) && (x_lsb_i[0] == 1'b1)  ? 4'b0011  : 
               4'b1111;
               (color_depth_i == 2'b00) && (x_lsb_i == 2'b01) ? {color_i[7:0], 16'h0000}   : 
               (color_depth_i == 2'b00) && (x_lsb_i == 2'b10) ? {color_i[7:0], 8'h00}      : 
               (color_depth_i == 2'b00) && (x_lsb_i == 2'b11) ? {color_i[7:0]}             : 
               (color_depth_i == 2'b01) && (x_lsb_i[0] == 1'b0)  ? {color_i[15:0], 16'h0000}   : 
               (color_depth_i == 2'b01) && (x_lsb_i[0] == 1'b1)  ? {color_i[15:0]}             : 
               color_i; 
endmodule

module bitwise_full_adder (
    input  A   ,
    input  B   ,
    input  CIN ,
    input  VPB ,
    input  VPWR,
    input  VGND,
    input  VNB ,
    output COUT,
    output SUM 
);

  assign COUT = (A & B) | (CIN & (A ^ B));
  assign SUM = (A ^ B) ^ CIN;

endmodule
